title: Bakgat, where friends become family!
description: BUSINESS NEWS - At Bakgat, our staff might...
bodyText: [{"type":"paragraph","text":"Sponsored Content","html":"Sponsored Content"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Bakgat, our staff might not all be in the picture, but every single one of us is here to work hard, bring the vibe, and make your nights unforgettable.","html":"BUSINESS NEWS - At Bakgat, our staff might not all be in the picture, but every single one of us is here to work hard, bring the vibe, and make your nights unforgettable."},{"type":"blockquote","text":"We’re more than just a team – we’re the Bakgat family, and we can’t wait to celebrate the start of spring with you at our Flower Power Weekend on 5 & 6 September."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Expect a groovy 60’s party, prizes on Saturday night, and a special guest set from DJ Sparkz in Inferno. Plus, Diamonds Tattoo Studio will be joining us with flash art tattoos for anyone who’s feeling extra bold.","html":"Expect a groovy 60’s party, prizes on Saturday night, and a special guest set from DJ Sparkz in Inferno. Plus, Diamonds Tattoo Studio will be joining us with flash art tattoos for anyone who’s feeling extra bold."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Behind the scenes, we’ve been busy upgrading and making Bakgat even better for you – Inferno now features brand-new murals (come see them in person), and we’re in the process of renovating our bathrooms, so thank you for your patience while we improve.","html":"Behind the scenes, we’ve been busy upgrading and making Bakgat even better for you – Inferno now features brand-new murals (come see them in person), and we’re in the process of renovating our bathrooms, so thank you for your patience while we improve."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Big things are happening, and we’d love you to be part of it. Grab your flower crowns, dress up, and come join the vibe – it’s time to make memories with the Bakgat family!","html":"Big things are happening, and we’d love you to be part of it. Grab your flower crowns, dress up, and come join the vibe – it’s time to make memories with the Bakgat family!"},{"type":"paragraph","text":"Join us on Facebook.","html":"Join us on Facebook."},{"type":"paragraph","text":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’","html":"‘We bring you the latest Garden Route, Hessequa, Karoo news’"}]
